title: lagenophora stipitata var. montana
intro: Lagenophora stipitata var. montana, also known as Mountain Daisy or Bush Daisy, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its leaves and stems displaying antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The plant's medicinal properties contribute to its health benefits, including the potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Lagenophora stipitata var. montana can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to various herbal preparations.
